name: Engineering
description: Responsible for software development, technical operations, and product building.

name: Product Management
description: Oversees product vision, roadmap, feature prioritization, and user experience.

name: Human Resources
description: Handles recruitment, onboarding, employee relations, performance management, and company culture.

name: Sales & Marketing
description: Responsible for lead generation, client relationships, marketing campaigns, and revenue growth.

name: Finance
description: Manages budgeting, financial planning, payroll, invoicing, and expense tracking.
